description: Multi-Provider Ask Tool - Support Claude Code and Codex as AI backends with provider switching and model selector

userStories.title: Expand check_tool_installed for Claude Code
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Rust backend to detect whether Claude Code CLI is installed, so the app can show install instructions or enable the provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'claude' match arm to check_tool_installed in apps/launcher/src/tools.rs using 'which claude' (linux) / 'where claude' (windows)
Invoking check_tool_installed('claude') returns correct ToolStatus
Existing 'codex' check still works
cargo check -p mrunner passes

userStories.title: Generalize model types and create unified list_ai_models command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need generic AI model types and a unified model listing command so the frontend can load models for any provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Rename CodexModel to AiModel and CodexReasoningLevel to AiReasoningLevel in apps/launcher/src/tools.rs
Add 'provider: String' field to AiModel struct

Create list_ai_models(provider: String) Tauri command that dispatches to codex (existing ~/.codex/models_cache.json logic) or claude (hardcoded list: claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5 with low/medium/high reasoning levels)
Remove old list_codex_models command and update invoke_handler in apps/launcher/src/lib.rs
cargo check -p mrunner passes

userStories.title: Add provider routing and Claude subprocess to send_ai_message
userStories.description: As a developer, I need send_ai_message to accept a provider parameter and spawn the correct CLI tool (codex or claude) with proper arguments.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'provider: String' parameter to send_ai_message in apps/launcher/src/tools.rs
Codex path unchanged: codex exec --json --model X -c 'model_reasoning_effort=Y' message
Claude path: claude -p --output-format stream-json --model X message
Remove CLAUDECODE env var before spawning claude to avoid nested-session error
cargo check -p mrunner passes

userStories.title: Normalize Claude stream-json events to existing Tauri event protocol
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Claude's stream-json output normalized to the same Tauri events the frontend already listens for, so the UI remains provider-agnostic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create parse_claude_event() helper in apps/launcher/src/tools.rs
Extract existing codex parsing into parse_codex_event() helper
Claude 'assistant/text' events emit ai-event-item-completed with item_type 'agent_message'
Claude 'assistant/thinking' events emit ai-event-item-completed with item_type 'reasoning'
Claude 'result' events emit ai-event-turn-completed with usage data
Dispatch to correct parser based on provider in the streaming thread
cargo check -p mrunner passes

userStories.title: Update frontend types for multi-provider support
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the frontend types updated to support multiple AI providers with per-provider model configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Claude Code entry to TOOL_PROVIDERS array in apps/renderer/src/core/types/tools.ts with id 'claude', amber color theme, install instructions, and docs URL
Rename CodexModel to AiModel (add provider: string field) and CodexReasoningLevel to AiReasoningLevel
Update UserPreferences.tools.ai in apps/renderer/src/core/types/command.ts to: { activeProvider: string, providers: { [id: string]: { model?: string, reasoningEffort?: string } } }
Update Zod schema accordingly
pnpm check passes

userStories.title: Add i18n keys for multi-provider UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want all new UI text translated so the app works in both English and Portuguese.
acceptanceCriteria: Add keys to apps/renderer/src/locales/en.json: tools.defaultProvider, tools.selectProvider, chat.selectModel, chat.searchModels, chat.noModelsFound
Add corresponding keys to apps/renderer/src/locales/pt-BR.json
pnpm check passes

userStories.title: Refactor useAIModels hook for multi-provider support
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the useAIModels hook to manage multiple providers with per-provider model/reasoning persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Add activeProvider state and setProvider() function to useAIModels in apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-ai-models.ts
Invoke list_ai_models with { provider: activeProvider } instead of list_codex_models
selectedModel and selectedReasoning are loaded per-provider from preferences.tools.ai.providers[id]
Switching provider reloads models and restores that provider's saved preferences
Add migration: detect old flat { provider, model, reasoningEffort } format and convert to new nested format on load
pnpm check passes

userStories.title: Refactor useAIChat hook for provider-aware messaging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need useAIChat to pass the active provider to the backend when sending messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add provider to UseAIChatOptions in apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-ai-chat.ts
Pass provider to invoke('send_ai_message', { provider, message, model, reasoningEffort })
checkToolInstalled uses the active provider's tool ID instead of hardcoded 'codex'
Event listeners remain unchanged (backend normalizes events)
pnpm check passes

userStories.title: Create ModelSelector component in packages/ui
userStories.description: As a user, I want a searchable model selector dialog with provider logos so I can quickly find and switch models.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/ui/src/components/ai-elements/model-selector.tsx with compound components: ModelSelector, ModelSelectorTrigger, ModelSelectorContent, ModelSelectorInput, ModelSelectorList, ModelSelectorEmpty, ModelSelectorGroup, ModelSelectorItem, ModelSelectorName, ModelSelectorLogo, ModelSelectorLogoGroup
ModelSelector wraps Dialog, ModelSelectorContent uses Command (cmdk) for search
ModelSelectorLogo uses Lucide icons for provider logos (no emoji, no large icon library barrel imports)
Component is importable from @mrunner/ui/ai-elements/model-selector
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: Follow the ai-elements skill reference at .claude/skills/ai-elements/references/model-selector.md and example at .claude/skills/ai-elements/scripts/model-selector.tsx

userStories.title: Integrate ModelSelector into AIChatView
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select the AI provider and model directly from the chat input so I can switch models per conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace TOOL_PROVIDERS[0] with dynamic provider lookup based on activeProvider in apps/renderer/src/components/ai-chat/ai-chat-view.tsx
Pass provider: activeProvider to useAIChat()
Add ModelSelector trigger button in PromptInputTools area of the chat footer
ModelSelector shows models grouped by provider with search
Selecting a model updates the conversation's active model
Header shows active provider name and selected model
All text uses t() function for i18n
pnpm check passes

userStories.title: Update ToolsSettingsTab with default provider selector
userStories.description: As a user, I want to set my default AI provider in Settings so new conversations use my preferred provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Default Provider' select dropdown at the top of apps/renderer/src/components/settings/tools-tab.tsx
Show installation status for both codex and claude providers
Model and reasoning selectors update when active provider changes
Each provider's model and reasoning preferences are persisted independently
All text uses t() function for i18n
pnpm check passes
